description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the jekyll/jekyll Docker image and sets the variables JEKYLL_ENV=production and LC_ALL=C.UTF-8. Define a single job named pages in the default test stage that runs the shell commands `bundle install` and `bundle exec jekyll build -d public`. Configure the job to publish the `public` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact and restrict execution to the master branch only. The pipeline should deploy the built site to GitLab Pages.
